title: GECOM30 - Product Master Data (EAN)
description: JSON for EAN master data load
description_es: JSON para la carga de datos maestros EAN
description_en: JSON for EAN master data load

TRTEXC.description_es: Código de procesamiento del movimiento - ver EnumTRTEXC

EANDS1.description: Designation linked to the EAN code
EANDS1.description_en: Designation linked to the EAN code

EDIPRM.description: Main EDI code identification / false = Secondary code, true = Primary code
EDIPRM.description_es: Identificación del código EDI principal / false = Código secundario, true = Código principal
EDIPRM.description_en: Main EDI code identification / false = Secondary code, true = Primary code

EDIQLF.description_es: Calificador del código EDI - ver EnumEDIQLF

EANVTE.description: Sale EAN / false = Not for sale, true = For sale
EANVTE.description_es: EAN de venta / false = No para venta, true = Para venta
EANVTE.description_en: Sale EAN / false = Not for sale, true = For sale

EnumTRTEXC.description: Movement processing code / 1 = Create, 2 = Modify or Create, 9 = Cancellation
EnumTRTEXC.description_es: Código de procesamiento del movimiento / 1 = Crear, 2 = Modificar o crear, 9 = Cancelación
EnumTRTEXC.description_en: Movement processing code / 1 = Create, 2 = Modify or Create, 9 = Cancellation

EnumMESPRO.description: Product measurement method / 1 = Fixed Weight, 2 = Variable Weight, 3 = Regulated Measurement
EnumMESPRO.description_es: Método de medición del producto / 1 = Peso fijo, 2 = Peso variable, 3 = Medición regulada
EnumMESPRO.description_en: Product measurement method / 1 = Fixed Weight, 2 = Variable Weight, 3 = Regulated Measurement

EnumEDIQLF.description: EDI code qualifier / 0 = CSU, 1 = Multi-product batch, 2 = SPCB, 3 = PCB, 4 = Box, 5 = Pallet
EnumEDIQLF.description_es: Calificador del código EDI / 0 = UVC, 1 = Lote multiproducto, 2 = SPCB, 3 = PCB, 4 = Caja, 5 = Palé
EnumEDIQLF.description_en: EDI code qualifier / 0 = CSU, 1 = Multi-product batch, 2 = SPCB, 3 = PCB, 4 = Box, 5 = Pallet
